creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
This fails to build in poudriere:

===>  Building fabio from 
go: contrib.go.opencensus.io/exporter/ocagent@v0.3.0: Get "https://proxy.golang.org/contrib.go.opencensus.io/exporter/ocagent/@v/v0.3.0.mod": dial tcp: lookup proxy.golang.org on 168.63.129.16:53: write udp 127.0.0.1:42364->168.63.129.16:53: write: can't assign
